story.introduction: Welcome to uDOS! Let's set up your profile and preferences to get you started.
story.context: This story will collect your basic information and system preferences to personalize your uDOS experience.
story.purpose: Configure your user environment and role-based access

variables.name: USER-ROLE
variables.prompt: What is your experience level with uDOS?
variables.help: Choose based on your technical experience: GHOST (new), WIZARD (expert)

variables.name: DEVELOPER-NAME
variables.help: This will be used in logs and project attribution

variables.name: PROJECT-TYPE
variables.description: Primary type of projects you work on
variables.prompt: What type of projects do you primarily work on?
variables.help: This helps us suggest relevant templates and tools

variables.name: DISPLAY-MODE
variables.prompt: How do you prefer to interact with uDOS?
variables.help: CLI for terminal users, DESKTOP for GUI, WEB for browser-based

variables.name: DETAIL-LEVEL
variables.prompt: How much detail do you want in system messages?
variables.help: MINIMAL for experts, VERBOSE for learning
